programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dr. Halperin counsels Dorothy at home; a police evacuation forces everyone to take refuge at the TV station.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy's Saturday night date causes Rose, Blanche and Sophia to recall scandalous evenings from the past.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose gives the boot to penny-pinching Miles; Blanche loses track of Sophia while Dorothy is vacationing.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: An old World War I buddy of John's tries to hide his failure in life by bragging about his daring wartime deeds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A colorful, self-styled writer (David Huddleston) dazzles John-Boy who jeopardizes a timber contract.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The Denby cousins move in unexpectedly and take advantage of hospitality.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Kyra repeatedly cancels plans with the family, Reba finds out that Barbra Jean is monopolizing all of her time.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean convinces unenthusiastic Reba to go clubbing; Van explains the birds and the bees to Jake.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: As he tries to woo a powerful sports agent who also happens to be gay, Van accidentally "outs" his mother-in-law.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba and Cheyenne throw a surprise party in honor of Van's new arena football contract, but the real surprise comes when Van announces he has been traded to a team in Denver.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba confronts Brock and Barbra Jean's therapist when she learns he holds her responsible for most of their marital problems; Cheyenne prepares to console Van on his first visit home but is crushed to find that he loves his life in Denver.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Reba encourages Brock to follow his dream of playing professional golf, Barbra Jean gets upset, fearing it may lead to the end of her marriage.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Cheyenne's emotions about Van living part-time in Denver boil over when she learns that he lied about having to return to Denver early.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean battle over who should host Thanksgiving dinner and feelings get hurt; BJ cooks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: While choking, Sophia has an out-of-body experience; Blanche protests the demolition of the family's plantation.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: A soldier returning from the Persian Gulf sweeps Blanche off her feet.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia accidentally comes away with the visiting pope's ring, then refuses to return it.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia seeks a swinging senior through the personals column; Rose can't recall an old beau who comes to visit her.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.sub-title: In the Clamor and the Clangor
programme.desc: Lorelai admits that she does not want Luke to leave Stars Hollow to move in with Nicole; Rory finds rumors of her obsession with William humiliating; Lane's double life is discovered.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Luke's ditzy sister surprises him with a visit; Lorelai is torn about telling her parents about her relationship with Jason; Paris talks to Rory about her affair.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.sub-title: Nag Hammadi Is Where They Found the Gnostic Gospels
programme.desc: Car trouble strands Jess in Stars Hollow; Jess walks away from Rory over and over again, then makes a startling confession; at a charity dinner, Emily asks Lorelai and Jason to pretend to be lovey-dovey.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love Takes Flight
programme.desc: A workaholic hospital director is forced to re-examine her rigid lifestyle when a free-wheeling EMS pilot enters her life.

programme.title: The Magic of Lemon Drops
programme.desc: When Lolly's Aunt Gert gives her three magical lemon drops, she gets to experience what her life would have been like if she had made different choices and lived those unfulfilled dreams.

programme.title: Love on the Air
programme.desc: Sonia moves to Chicago to be with her boyfriend and starts a new radio gig. When her relationship ends, she confides in a competing shock jock and the two become rivals. When they are forced to work together, they find they have a lot in common.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Deadly Recipe
programme.desc: Bakery owner Hannah Swensen just can't keep her hands out of the batter when murder stirs things up in Lake Eden, Minn.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: A teacher breathes life into Dorothy's decades-old crush on him; Rose makes her debut as a TV producer.

programme.desc: Blanche fails to seduce her date and is heartbroken; Dorothy goes bananas over a "Beatlemania" cast member.

programme.desc: The sheriff asks John-Boy's help when the Baldwin sisters' cousin (Denver Pyle) plans to bootleg their "recipe.".

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Mary Ellen falls for a minstrel and resists helping the family fulfill a vital contract.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The Waltons aid an actress (Pippa Scott) whose chauffeur robbed and abandoned her after her car broke down.

programme.desc: Reba confronts Brock and Barbra Jean's therapist when she learns he holds her responsible for most of their marital problems; Cheyenne prepares to console Van on his first visit home but is crushed to find that he loves his life in Denver.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean battle over who should host Thanksgiving dinner and feelings get hurt; BJ cooks.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba allows Kyra to spend time unsupervised with her boyfriend, but she questions that decision when she learns they broke the rules.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Cheyenne and the rest of the family try to cheer Van up after a knee injury ends his arena-football career; Van receives a payout from the team but begins to blow the money on gifts for the family.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba learns that Van has hired a nanny so that he can spend more time goofing off and doing all the things he didn't do before.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean confesses that she has a big crush on her new marriage counselor, and she asks Reba to help her fire him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy dreams she is a contestant on "Jeopardy!" but the game is fixed in favor of neighbor Charlie Dietz.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan
programme.desc: Dorothy and Stan are ordered by a judge to inhabit one of their substandard apartments.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Dorothy replaces Blanche as the center of attention for the men at Blanche's favorite nightspot.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia becomes a doting mother when Dorothy accepts a lucrative corporate teaching job.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Rory succumbs to self-doubt after a professor suggests she drop a class; Lorelai takes out her frustration on Sookie; Gran is nasty to Richard and Emily.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Rory gets a glimpse of Dean's new life; Lorelai and Rory get swept up in Emily's wild shopping spree, then Emily admits her out-of-control spending is in retaliation against Richard's neglect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: The sudden loss of his mother undoes Richard; Emily finds an old letter to her husband from her mother-in-law; Lorelai takes over the funeral arrangements.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Polar Opposites
programme.desc: Emma needs to get to Antarctica to reach her father and travels to South America but can't get on a boat for the last leg. She sneaks onto a cruise ship and meets engineer Andy.

programme.title: Love on the Danube: Kissing Stars
programme.desc: A publicist and a movie star's professional collaboration leads to an unexpected romance on a cruise.

programme.title: On the 12th Date of Christmas
programme.desc: Two seemingly incompatible game designers in Chicago team up to create a romantic city-wide scavenger hunt to promote a hotel chain.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent with a knack for turning around schools meets a single father who works as the head of the school's bankrupt music department. As she rediscovers her passion for music, she works to save the dreams of the kids who love music.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: After she sees Dorothy and Miles' spur-of-the-moment kiss, Sophia must tell this to Rose; the last thing she needs to do to break the curse is tell a friend of a betrayal.
